$comment: Copy to <project>/specwright/mcp-always-on.json and fill with your project-specific MCP server configs. Format matches the official .mcp.json spec — you can copy entries directly from ~/.claude.json or an existing .mcp.json. Only servers listed here are available to profiled workflows (execute-tasks, create-spec, validate-market). Recommended to add this file to .gitignore if it contains credentials.
